_meta.title: Image Player
_meta.description: - Image player component, flexible to use takes array of images urls and interval, also you can use any html image tag '' (by default) or '' or use next 'Image' this on is very recommended (check the demo) as next optimized images makes load fast. 👉 Docs: https://systaliko-ui.vercel.app/docs/blocks/image-player
